description: Style Note remanika combines edgy style with flattering fits in all their creations, including this trendy top. With excellent styling and a well designed look, this feminine top will get the temperatures soaring when paired with a pair of shorts and flat strappy slip ons.Product Details Red top, has a V neckline with ruffles around, short sleeves with elastication and gathers, and ruffles down the centre from the neckline to the hemline Material and Care Viscose Gentle machine wash Do not bleach and flat dry only Use cold iron  Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
